title: PCL:PEG Electrospinning
author: Kenneth Schackart
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yaffsbn

steps.title: In 50 mL tube, add 14...
steps.instruction: In 50 mL tube, add 14 mL chloroform and 6 mL acetone. This is your solvent solution. The solvent solution should be 70% chloroform and 30% acetone. You can adjust volumes accordingly. Always work with these solvents in chemical fume hood.

steps.title: In 15 mL tube dissolve 1...
steps.instruction: In 15 mL tube dissolve 1 g PCL in 10 mL solvent solution to make a 10 Mass / % volume solution of PCL in solvent.

steps.title: In a second 15 mL tube...
steps.instruction: In a second 15 mL tube dissolve 500 mg PEG in 10 mL solvent solution to make a 5 Mass / % volume solution of PEG in solvent.

steps.title: Place the solvent solutions on a...
steps.instruction: Place the solvent solutions on a rocker overnight to fully dissolve.

steps.title: Fold a 10 cm × 10...
steps.instruction: Fold a 10 cm × 10 cm piece of aluminum foil.

steps.title: Attach foil square to copper plate
steps.instruction: Attach foil square to copper plate.

steps.title: Using double-sided tape, attach cover slips onto aluminum foil
steps.instruction: Using double-sided tape, attach cover slips onto aluminum foil.

steps.title: Face the copper plate normal to...
steps.instruction: Face the copper plate normal to the syringe pump within the enclosure, and move until the plate is approximately 9 cm away from the needle. Increasing the distance will decrease fiber diameter.

steps.title: Vortex the PCL:PEG solution for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Vortex the PCL:PEG solution for 3 minutes

steps.title: Combine the polymer solutions at a...
steps.instruction: Combine the polymer solutions at a rate of 3 parts PCL solution to 1 part PEG solution.

steps.title: Pour PCL:PEG solution onto petri dish...
steps.instruction: Pour PCL:PEG solution onto petri dish and draw solutin into a 10 mL syringe with 23 ga. tip.

steps.title: Purge any bubbles from the syringe...
steps.instruction: Purge any bubbles from the syringe by holding the syringe with the tip facing upward and depressing the plunger.

steps.title: Load syringe onto syringe pump, and secure
steps.instruction: Load syringe onto syringe pump, and secure.

steps.title: Clip the ground (black) wire to...
steps.instruction: Clip the ground (black) wire to the leads coming from the copper plate. Clip positive (red) wire to the syringe needle.

steps.title: Set syringe pump rate to 20 µL/min, and begin pumping
steps.instruction: Set syringe pump rate to 20 µL/min, and begin pumping.

steps.title: Turn on power source set to 15,000 V
steps.instruction: Turn on power source set to 15,000 V. Do not touch any of the power source leads. Turn off power source to make any adjustments to the setup.

steps.title: If necessary, "aim" the needle/syringe pump...
steps.instruction: If necessary, "aim" the needle/syringe pump to obtain a uniform layer on all coverslips.

steps.title: If clumping occurs at the needle,...
steps.instruction: If clumping occurs at the needle, use a non-conducting material to clear.

steps.title: Once a desired thickness has been...
steps.instruction: Once a desired thickness has been spun, turn off power supply and allow to cool for 2-3 min.

steps.title: Detach power supply leads
steps.instruction: Detach power supply leads.

steps.title: Use a blade to cut the...
steps.instruction: Use a blade to cut the fibers between the cover slips. Use caution not to disturb the fibers on the cover slips.

steps.title: Remove cover slips carefully
steps.instruction: Remove cover slips carefully.
